quemSouEu.desc: Physician, founder and president of the Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy (ABPR).
quemSouEu.beginTitle: From a small office in Porto Alegre to the world
quemSouEu.beginP1: The journey begins in a small office in Porto Alegre/RS, when I worked only as a homeopathic physician.
quemSouEu.beginP2: During a session, I was inspired by the Spiritual World to add Reincarnation to my therapeutic work. That is how Reincarnationist Psychotherapy was born, along with its tool "Inquiry into the Unconscious" (Regression) — ethical, guided by people's Spiritual Mentors and respecting the Law of Forgetfulness.
quemSouEu.abprP1: On August 10, 2004 the Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy — ABPR — was founded by a small group of idealists.
quemSouEu.abprP2: It is responsible for consolidating and expanding this new psychotherapeutic method, always remaining faithful to the Teachings sent by the Spiritual World.
quemSouEu.abprP3: We are now around 28 instructors of the Training Course across 17 Brazilian states, with hundreds of reincarnationist psychotherapists already trained or in training, and thousands of people supported by this new psychological view of the embodied human being.
quemSouEu.prP1: Reincarnationist Psychotherapy is a modern psychological school that integrates Reincarnation, developing the concept that our life does not begin in childhood and that our personality is simply a continuation of who we were in the previous incarnation — the key to understanding our proposal of Inner Reform.
quemSouEu.prP2: More deeply, it understands that we are the Whole (God) and a micro-manifestation of this Whole, but we forget this and believe we are our current character, its labels and illusions.
quemSouEu.careerTitle: Five decades dedicated to healing and teaching
quemSouEu.careerP1: I am a physician trained at the UFRGS School of Medicine in 1971. Since 1996 I have devoted myself to this new psychological view — the School of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy. I am Founder, Patron, former multi-term President and currently Director of Education of the Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy (ABPR).
quemSouEu.careerP2: I was a Russian writer in my previous incarnation and remain so today, having authored 19 books, some in print and some as e-books, including:
quemSouEu.ctaTitle: Deepen your studies with my teachings
quemSouEu.ctaDesc: Access courses, books, e-books and exclusive live sessions in the Study Club.

tratando-fobia-panico-depressao.title: Treating Phobia, Panic and Depression with Regression Therapy – 3rd Ed.
tratando-fobia-panico-depressao.synopsis:
This book aims to show people who suffer from these conditions that great improvement, and even healing, is possible — but to achieve that we need to find the situations that originated them, which in the vast majority of cases lie in traumatic events from other incarnations to which they remain attuned to this day.

In this book, Dr. Mauro — physician, founder and patron of the School of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy — first presents the traditional, non-reincarnationist view of these conditions, and then the reincarnationist view. The former is limited to the current life and treats us as if we were our brain; the latter sees us as energetic beings, materialized in an apparently physical, multidimensional body.

It also includes cases of Inquiry into the Unconscious ("Regression") with people experiencing these resonances, revealing the origin of the symptoms of Phobias, Panic and Depression in their past lives, hidden within their Unconscious. By accessing and remembering until everything has passed and they feel well, the disconnection takes place, leading to great improvements and many cures.

evoluir-espiritualmente-mundo-de-drogas.title: How to Evolve Spiritually in a World of Drugs
evoluir-espiritualmente-mundo-de-drogas.synopsis:
In this book, Dr. Mauro — physician, founder and patron of the School of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy — addresses every kind of drug that afflicts humanity, including the System-drug we are immersed in, responsible for this true drug epidemic that simultaneously creates and encourages drug use while pretending to fight it.

We are in a reincarnation cycle on this planet, far from the Central Nucleus of the Universe, with a purpose: to learn about the inferior states existing here and, by freeing ourselves from them, return to the state of purity we were in before arriving.

Among these inferiorities, evil people created the so-called drugs, hypocritically divided into two classes: the legal ones, which enrich the official cartels, and the illegal ones, which enrich the marginal cartels.

This book was originally going to be called "How to evolve spiritually in a drug of a world", but the publisher asked the author to move "drug" elsewhere in the title. To this day, the author isn't sure he was right to accept that request.

fascinante-vida-de-mirta-kassov.title: The Fascinating Life of Mirta Kassov: The Lessons and Learnings of a Regression Therapist
fascinante-vida-de-mirta-kassov.synopsis:
– Good afternoon, are you Dr. Mirta Kassov?
– Yes, ma'am.
– Are you the one who works with regression?
– I am.
– May I come up? I need to talk to you, to find out if you can help me. I have a phobia, and they say it has no cure — that I have to live with it, take medication, do desensitization, expose myself, but I…
– Yes, I know. Come in, I was waiting for you.
– You were waiting for me? How did you know I would come here?
– Shall we go up?

This scene took place after Carolina spent the whole day looking for a certain Dr. Mirta, a regression therapist whose address nobody knew exactly — they said it was somewhere in a certain neighborhood, and she went.

This is how Dr. Mauro Kwitko's book begins — and, by coincidence, he shares the same initials as Dr. Mirta Kassov.

20-casos-de-regressao.title: 20 Cases of Regression (7th Ed.)
20-casos-de-regressao.synopsis: Twenty true stories of people who found, in their past lives, the explanation for and liberation from symptoms such as Phobias, Panic Syndrome, severe Depression, low self-esteem, shyness, fear of rejection, feelings of abandonment, loneliness, ideas of persecution, migraines, fibromyalgia and other ailments. Their accounts of passing through the Umbral, experiences in the Astral Plane, encounters with Spiritual Guides and disincarnated relatives, the return to Earth, the intrauterine period, and more. A revolutionary and enlightening book that shows us how to face this earthly journey with much more responsibility and understanding, allowing us to fulfill our true pre-reincarnation missions.

terapia-de-regressao-perguntas-e-respost.title: Regression Therapy: Questions and Answers
terapia-de-regressao-perguntas-e-respost.synopsis:
This new edition of "Regression Therapy: questions and answers", after the great success of the previous ones, arrives completely reformulated, updated and expanded, with new questions, new answers and new chapters.

In this book, Dr. Mauro teaches what Regression Therapy is, warns about the precautions we must take when choosing to undergo it, its indications and contraindications, its physical, psychological and karmic risks, the fear of "staying there", who the pioneers were, the main Schools in Brazil and abroad, how to reconcile Regression with the Law of Forgetfulness, and much more!

For those who want to better understand what it means to remember past lives, why to do so, how it can benefit them, and which professional to choose for such a delicate procedure, this book is a guide made for that.

And for health professionals who wish to know the history of this Therapy that goes beyond Genetics and uncovers our Unconscious — a work begun by Freud, Jung and continued today by various more contemporary Schools — this book can open new conscious and professional horizons.

terapia-da-reforma-intima.title: The Therapy of Inner Reform
terapia-da-reforma-intima.synopsis:
This is a foundational book of the School of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, the greatest revolution in the history of Psychology since Freud, as it incorporates our previous incarnations into the diagnostic, psychotherapeutic and therapeutic framework for chronic illnesses — physical, emotional or mental.

This new vision is a creation of a group of Spiritual Beings from the Astral Plane, and has been transmitted to Dr. Mauro since 1996. It is the same Therapy used in the Inter-life Period, with the difference that the great "Screen" here is mental rather than holographic, for now. This mental Screen is the Inquiry into the Unconscious ("Regression"), ethical and respectful of the Law of Forgetfulness.

Reincarnation was removed from the memory of people on the western side of our planet by a decision of the Second Council of Constantinople in 553 A.D., convened solely to decree that Reincarnation does not exist. As a result, official Philosophy, Medicine (including Psychiatry) and Psychology took shape as non-reincarnationist — that is, without realizing it, they followed this religious dogma.

jovens-guerreiros-guerreiras-da-luz.title: Young Warriors of the Light
jovens-guerreiros-guerreiras-da-luz.synopsis:
The purpose of this book is to bring a Message to young people so that they remember who they are, why they reincarnated, what they came to do here on Earth, and how to free themselves from the power of the System that seeks to prevent them from fulfilling their Mission: to create a new Era for humanity.

Young people are, in great part, Spirits who came to bring more Light, Peace, Harmony, Solidarity and Fraternity to this planet. But to achieve this spiritual goal they need to remember it and free themselves from the influence that a System based solely on profit exerts over them.

The Message of this book is a warning to these Young Emissaries of the Light about the perverse tactics used by the System to dominate their minds and put them in its service. They must be careful with what is placed in their minds from a very early age, taking care not to be deceived by the "normal way of things" and by phrases like "to be young is…".

transtorno-do-espectro-autista: Autism Spectrum Disorder is still a mysterious condition for Psychology and Medicine. No one knows its cause, no one has an explanation. Why are so many children being born, and increasingly so, with these symptoms, with this introspection, with this insulation?

Similar to other medical conditions, even those due to genetic disorders, because Medicine only goes as far as Genetics, not yet dealing with pre-Genetics, they acquire the label of being of “unknown origin,” “idiopathic,” which are milder denominations than stating we are all ignorant about their origin.

But where do they come from? Why are so many children born with this? Why is their number increasing? What do they mean? Going as far as Genetics and finding nothing there, we are circling around something about which we have no idea. Many genes are being related to this Disorder, but what about before Genetics? What existed before Genetics is our field of research; it is into this that we are entering. All great discoveries have never easily received official acceptance; on the contrary, they have always taken decades or centuries to be recognized as scientific truths.

One issue that hinders pre-Genetic research is that the procedures we perform to investigate people's Unconscious reveal past centuries, past lives, that is, Reincarnation. But who said that Reincarnation is only a religious concept? We are dealing with this in a scientific way. But then two impasses arise:

Science, still materialistic, due to centuries of predominance of non-reincarnationist religions, still active, does not deal with Reincarnation, claiming it is a religious concept, without realizing that not dealing with it is also a religious concept.

Some claim that they are not the past lives of that person, but rather of ancestors, grandparents, great-grandparents, etc. But for people of, for example, German origin, to access past lives of Black, African “ancestors” is, at the very least, somewhat strange… Jews who were Arabs, Arabs who were Jews, etc., is a very difficult family tree to understand. If Empress Theodora, an ex-courtesan, had not ordered the killing of her former colleagues and convinced her husband, Emperor Justinian, to convene the 2nd Council of Constantinople in 553 AD, the Catholic Church and its dissidences would be reincarnationist religions, and Western Psychology, Psychiatry, Philosophy, and Science would not be shackled by these ties that suffocate them, and, in a few decades, new generations of incarnated Spirits will demand that they open up, free themselves from this religious belief, and continue the work of Breuer, Freud, Jung, and others, as we are doing.

For now, this great revolution that is approaching, far superior to the discoveries of lands across the sea, far superior to the discoveries that space travel is and will continue to reveal, is not yet considered “Science,” as if “Science” were something ready and finished, and not a Work in permanent construction, in continuous expansion.

We are still at the beginning of the Inquiry into the Unconscious of people with Autism Spectrum Disorder, but one thing we already know: the cause, the origin, the explanation, lies in their past incarnations. There is no single cause; each case is unique. And we are beginning to understand that the motivation for a gift, a talent, a vocation, that interested them, moved them, strongly motivated them when they were in the Spiritual World, before re-incarnating, being remembered and stimulated in these Spirits who (re)incarnate with ASD, is a factor that can make them begin to rescue this within themselves and give them the desire to come out of themselves, begin, through the power of their thought, to weaken the “energetic armor” they built to protect themselves, begin to activate communication channels with people, with the external world to themselves, in order to exercise here, during incarnation, this gift, this talent, this motivation.

How many scientists, artists, writers, poets, painters, some true geniuses, were considered autistic, mentally ill, in their childhood, and then revealed their gift, their talent? The current psychiatric paradigm is excessively focused on medication; many need it but many do not. What is lacking in current Psychiatry is to truly seek the explanation, the origin, of disorders without an apparent cause, without explanation, even with the most modern imaging exams, attractive, multicolored, but which have not yet surpassed the brain in its physical aspect. And as we record the Sessions and send them to the family, their relatives, aware of this gift, of a talent, a vocation, can, in this way, direct them to this activity.

In our research into their past lives, something has been recurring in the way of being of people who today present with ASD: a strong tendency to isolation, to loneliness. Whether due to fear, hypersensitivity, depression, guilt, etc., regardless of the cause, isolation and loneliness intensely predominate in the past lives of these people, and even today.

But, while in those lives, they isolated themselves, closed themselves off, for their reasons, ASD is much more than that; it is not just a tendency to isolation, selective mutism, shyness, low self-esteem, or the opposite, pride, vanity, anger, etc. These conditions could be treated psychologically; ASD is much more than that, it is as if the repetitive thought over several lives, of not relating, not getting involved, for whatever reason, had created an “energetic armor” between the Being and the character, affecting, inclusive, the connection channels between the physical body and the so-called perispirit, which have become, we can say, deactivated.
But they can be activated, but for this, a Treatment with 3 aspects is necessary:

__LIST__Internal – a deep and gradual inner change, of truly wanting to “come out from within.” It is a true Inner Reform.||External – in their environment, whether family, educational, and psychotherapeutic, changing the label of “disease” or “disorder” to a “circumstance of the incarnated Spirit.”||Intermediate – an energetic Treatment on the connections aimed at activating them, gradually, which may or may not be effective depending mainly on the being's receptivity to this therapeutic aspect, which will be directly proportional to their profound inner change.

The Spiritual Mentors of people with ASD, in the sessions of accessing past lives, are beginning to teach us, to transmit, in the little we are capable of understanding, about what Autism is, the cause, the explanation, the origin of this “energetic armor” created as a defense against being incarnated here, by the succession of traumas from past lives, and the possibility of improvement through favorable conditions in their family environment, the action of educators, of therapists, combined with an inner change that creates and, gradually, increases a desire to come “out of oneself,” to go “out there,” to truly live, interact, co-exist, which can be greatly favored by the discovery of a talent, a vocation, a gift, a mission, that is hidden, and that reinforces this desire.

The recollections of the passages through the Spiritual World, after each accessed past life, until reaching that moment we call the “Optimal Point,” is, probably, an exclusive procedure of our Method, I believe, in Brazil and in the world. The recollections of the intervened periods, what the being studies when they are there, what they dedicate themselves to, in what area they work (art, science, research, etc.), can signal to their family and educators what can motivate them to want to “come out,” to practice here what they practice there.

The Spiritual Mentors have been telling us that releasing past traumas has a very positive, even indispensable, effect for the improvement of these cases, but the positive action of the environment (family, school, and therapeutic) and the awakening of this internal desire to “come out of oneself” is necessary, and that a complete change can occur in one incarnation or, perhaps, in a few, but it needs to start, and now we are working together with the Spiritual Mentors in this regard.

Another cause of ASD is the Spirit re-incarnating blocked to prevent them from committing acts harmful to others or to themselves, committed in past incarnations. This is what we can call a “Divine Decree.” In reality, it is beneficial for that Spirit because, if they cannot do good, at least they do not do more harm. This is the most ventured hypothesis in spiritualist books. The previous hypothesis is not yet being valued, although it accounts for the majority of cases. As scientists, as researchers, we are investigating the Unconscious of these brothers and sisters, and our discoveries and results will be disseminated here in Brazil and in other countries, soon through Research Works submitted to Scientific Journals, Events, and official Congresses.

And we want to make it clear that we are talking about Reincarnation and not Religion. Reincarnation is not just a religious concept; it has now entered the psychotherapeutic office, initially for Alternative Therapists, who offer alternative therapies to those officially accepted, and will soon be incorporated by Psychology and Psychiatry, by new generations of psychologists and psychiatrists, many of whom are reincarnationists.
In the Unconscious resides pre-Genetics and, again, I am not talking about Religion, but about Quantum Physics.
beneficios-contraindicacoes-da-regressao: The same function as the Screen during Therapy performed in the inter-life period: to recall past lives on Earth, to evaluate our performance in them, how much we have taken advantage of them in a spiritual sense, what we are like when we descend to Earth and how we feel when we return Home with the blossoming of our superiorities. There, on the true Screen, the Mentors show our karmic relationships, who we and other people were in past lives, who did what to whom, when we were victims, when we were executioners, but here on Earth, on the “light” Screen, They very rarely show this, only when it is absolutely necessary, when someone refuses to leave the victim position.

In all Inquiry into the Unconscious (“Regression”) Sessions, there is a disconnection from past lives, but some have only this purpose, for the improvement or cure of phobias, panic, severe depressions, and chronic physical pains. In these cases, the purpose is only disconnection and not to show personality characteristics, tendencies of feelings, attitudes, or postures, although a little can be perceived in the situations encountered, for example, a tendency to loneliness, guilt, isolation, depression, hurt, suicidal tendencies, etc.
This procedure has the following contraindications:

__LIST__People with heart problems (cardiopaths)||People with high blood pressure (hypertensive)||People who have suffered a stroke (hemorrhagic or ischemic)||Very elderly people||Pregnant women, except in cases of extreme necessity (physical or emotional)

In these cases, the Inquiry into the Unconscious at a Distance is indicated, where another person, authorized by the Spiritual Mentors of the beneficiary, accesses past incarnations of the person who cannot undergo the process, and this person remains present in the consulting room, listening to the report, and afterwards we have the post-Regression conversation with them. If the person in need resides in a city or state where we do not have reincarnationist psychotherapists or has some impediment to being present, they receive the audio of the Session.
investigacao-do-inconsciente-em-criancas: This procedure, when necessary (fears, extreme shyness, tendency to isolation, phobias, sadness without apparent cause, autism, congenital diseases, etc.) can be performed for the benefit of children in two ways:

For older children, sitting at a small table, drawing, or through a playful activity, the psychotherapist observes without interfering, without asking what they are drawing, without trying to interpret what it means, the shapes, colors, etc. Allow the child's Spiritual Mentor to intuit them to recall a past life and encourage them to continue drawing or playing until everything has passed and they are in the Spiritual World. The Optimal Point is when they are drawing angels, Jesus, Our Lady, clouds, God.

For very young children or if parents do not wish to subject the child to this procedure, it can be done through their father or mother, a family member, or someone from our School. The child should not come to the office. The detachment has the same beneficial effect, and should, as always, occur at the Optimal Point.
mensagem-aos-espiritas: __SUB__We fully agree with the criticisms and opposition to the so-called Regression Therapy by some Spiritists and leaders of Spiritist Centers and Federations, because, in fact, a certain portion of regression therapists do not perform this Therapy as recommended by the Spiritual World and many interfere with the Law of Oblivion, directing the recollection, fulfilling the person's wish, what they want to know, things like “What were my girlfriend and I?”, “I want to know why my son hates me”, “I came here to find out why I’ve always hated my mother!”, “I want to know if my soulmate is incarnated…” and, worse, encouraging the recognition of people in the past.

__SUB__This is not Regression Therapy; it is an invasion of privacy, reincarnational nosiness, and a very serious infraction of the Law of Karma. According to what Spiritual Beings teach, the therapist who proceeds in this way will be aggravating the Karma between people and will be entering their Karma, that is, it is misconduct for the people involved and for the therapist themselves. But, even so, many regression therapists, in Brazil and around the world, practice this unethical attitude, believing themselves immune to Divine Laws.

__SUB__One of the goals of the Brazilian Association of Reincarnation Psychotherapy is precisely to collaborate in the moralization of Regression Therapy, which we call “Inquiry into the Unconscious”, to prevent this procedure from becoming vulgarized and turning into an adventure, a mere trip, tourism to past lives, without criteria, without seriousness, without ethics. We, who work in this area, hear cases of regression therapists and their techniques, their conceptions, ways of carrying out the work; often, one of us says: “But the Spiritists are really right to be against regression.” And they are, because a certain portion of regression therapists do not do it as the Spiritual World teaches. They decide what the person will see, what they will access, or, if someone comes to do regression to find out why their mother liked their brother more than them, why they hated their father, why they have difficulties with their child, why this, why that, the therapist agrees, performs their procedures, and the person finds the answer they wanted. And, even worse, when someone recalls someone killing, hanging, robbing, raping, the therapist asks: “And who is this person today?”, the person recognizes and it's their father, it's their mother, it's their brother, and if there was already resentment, if there was already anger, all of this gets worse. And if, by chance, it wasn't the person they recognized, but they thought it was someone they resent or are angry with, things get even worse. This is not Regression Therapy; this is a completely unethical attitude from a karmic point of view, and the Spiritual World is against this practice, but, within free will, each person and each therapist can do what they want.

__SUB__We, from ABPR, ensure that this Therapy is established and structured correctly from a spiritual point of view, from a cosmo-ethical point of view. In our books, articles, and training courses, all our instructors and monitors pay attention to these issues, as they are fundamental to us. Readers and students of the courses understand why the sessions must be guided by the person's Spiritual Mentors and not by the therapists, why the recollection must go to the inter-lives period (Optimal Point), and why it is forbidden to encourage recognition.

__SUB__In fact, ethics in our School begins even before the procedure; it begins when we do not lead the recollection to the reason for the consultation, to the person's complaint; we simply help the person enter a meditative state, without directing, without guiding. When the person is well relaxed, with their frequency higher, their Spiritual Mentors give them the opportunity to access an incarnation, and that's when the recollection begins. The Inquiry into the Unconscious is very similar to the Screen used in Therapy performed in the Astral Plane, as long as both are commanded by the Spiritual World. This is mandatory and that's how it should be.
o-livro-dos-espiritos: The Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy has, as one of its main guidelines, an absolute respect for the Law of Forgetting, in other words, we conduct Regressions in accordance with the Law of Forgetting, as cited in The Spirits' Book, in question 399 regarding “Forgetting the past”:

__QUOTE__Submerged in corporeal life, the Spirit momentarily loses the memory of its previous existences, as if a veil covered them. However, it sometimes retains a vague consciousness, and these can be revealed to it. This revelation, however, is made spontaneously only by superior Spirits, for a useful purpose, never to satisfy vain curiosity.||The Spirits' Book

According to the Spiritual Beings who guided Allan Kardec in the codification of Spiritism, the memory of previous existences can be revealed, but with a criterion: only superior Spirits spontaneously do so, for a useful purpose. This is the rigid and immutable criterion adopted by the School of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, taught in our Training Courses, and used, as far as we know, by all reincarnationist psychotherapists trained and affiliated with ABPR. Non-observance of this criterion is grounds for action by ABPR's Ethics Department against the psychotherapist and may result in their dismissal from the Association.
a-etica-da-investigacao-do-inconsciente: The Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy expresses its deep concern about the direction this procedure, commonly called Regression Therapy, has been taking in Brazil and worldwide. This therapy has already shown that it is not a fad; it is established and practiced by many doctors, psychologists and psychotherapists in Brazil and in several countries, as can be observed in literature, on the Internet, and at national and international Congresses and Events.

Our concern, which meets the greatest and absolutely reasonable contestation that this Past Life Therapy receives from leaders and people connected to Spiritism, concerns the interference and infringement that a certain portion of regression therapists commit in relation to a Divine Law: the Law of Forgetfulness.

The Method we use makes it possible to reconcile the seemingly irreconcilable: the Inquiry into the Unconscious with the Law of Forgetfulness. In this sense, we have been integrating with Spiritist Houses and Federations, aiming for a broad debate between Spiritism – and one of its flags, which is respect for the Law of Forgetfulness – and health professionals, practitioners, Past Life Therapy Course instructors, directors and members of Regression Therapy Associations and Institutes, regarding this topic.

The Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy has, as one of its main guidelines, absolute respect for the Law of Forgetfulness, that is, we carry out this procedure obeying the Law of Forgetfulness, as cited in the “Book of Spirits,” in question 399 regarding the “Forgetfulness of the past”:

__QUOTE__Plunging into corporeal life, the Spirit momentarily loses the memory of its previous existences, as if a veil covered them. However, it sometimes retains a vague consciousness, and these can be revealed to it. This revelation, however, is only spontaneously made by superior Spirits, for a useful purpose, never to satisfy vain curiosity.
Our Method faithfully obeys this determination. It consists of the following basic aspects:

1st) The direction of the procedure is totally decided and guided by the Spiritual Mentors of the individuals; our psychotherapist does not induce, suggest, hypnotize, command, or conduct the process. Instead, they merely help the person relax their physical body (Meditation) to become accessible to their Spiritual Mentors, without directing the retrieval of memory, without deciding what the person will access, and without fulfilling their desires and aspirations regarding their past, not even the reason for their consultation, their complaint (physical or psychological), much less any curiosity they may have. The psychotherapist's role in our Method is in the initial phase (Meditation), while the past lives to be accessed are entirely at the discretion of the Spiritual World.
2nd) The recognition of people in the past is never encouraged, so as not to infringe the Law of Forgetfulness.

3rd) The person is encouraged to recall the past life their Mentors made available to them, up to the moment of their death, their disincarnation, the ascent to the Spiritual World (Inter-life Period) until all resonances of earthly life have disappeared and they feel very well (Optimal Point). Sometimes the recollection begins when the person had already “died” and was in Spirit; in these cases, our encouragement is to recall what happened afterward, how they ascended to the Spiritual World, how everything passed, how they got well, until their recollection reaches the Optimal Point.

4th) At the end of the procedure (at the Optimal Point), guidance and instructions for their current life are frequently received, where their Mentors take advantage of their meditative state, their elevated frequency, and transmit advice for their current incarnation.

The objective of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy – the Therapy of Inner Reform of our ego – is, through a treatment lasting several months or some years, to help people, with weekly or bi-weekly consultations of 1 hour duration, and 5 or 6 Inquiry into the Unconscious Sessions (averaging 2 hours), to find what André Luiz calls “Congenital Personality,” in “Workers of Eternal Life,” pages 32-34, in a lecture by Dr. Barcelos, a disincarnate psychiatrist, in Nosso Lar:

__QUOTE__…only here could I recall the missing links (referring to Dr. Freud's work) in the system of validating the origins of psychoses and various imbalances. The “inferiority complexes,” “repression,” “libido,” the “emergences of the subconscious,” do not constitute factors acquired in the short span of an earthly existence, but rather characteristics of the personality derived from past experiences. The subconscious is, in fact, the expanded hold of our memories, the repository of emotions and desires, impulses and tendencies… and they extend far beyond the limited zone of time in which a physical apparatus moves. Sigmund Freud's theories and his continuators lack the notion of reincarnationist principles… We need to disseminate in the world the moralizing concept of Congenital Personality in a process of gradual improvement, spreading new enunciations that cross the zone of fallible human reasoning….

This notion of Congenital Personality that Dr. Barcelos asks to be disseminated across the Earth's crust is our personality from past lives in recent centuries; it is the personality we have presented since birth, what differentiates one sibling from another in the same family, and it is where our proposal of Inner Reform is found and identified. That is why he asks, and we are following his guidance, that this notion be spread on Earth, so that people may know why they have reincarnated, based on it. This is one of the basic pillars of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy and is where we find our proposal for Inner Reform, the purpose of this new School.

In addition to the Congenital Personality, Dr. Barcellos speaks of “fallible human reasoning,” which needs to be corrected. This is advanced Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, only possible to carry out through the maturation of the ego of people in treatment, of the infantile, adolescent, and inferior adult aspects, which must be transmuted into the superior aspects of these levels of their ego, until, one day, in this or in future incarnations, they reach the elder level of the ego, and begin to act here on Earth commanded by their Higher Self, forgetting themselves and beginning to live primarily for others, until, further on, they realize that there is no “I” and “others,” that we are all One.

For most people, the basic level of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy is still used, due to the low conscious level of their ego. How can we help these people find their Congenital Personality? Through the Inquiry into the Unconscious Sessions that we offer during treatment, in which their Mentors choose the past lives they will access. As if on the Screen that exists in the Spiritual World, commanded by the people's Mentors, we now have “The Screen on Earth,” which must also be commanded by Them. But, in addition to finding and, through the disengagement promoted by complete recollection, greatly improving or curing Phobias, Panic Disorder, Depression arising from past life events, chronic physical pain, etc., the great conscious purpose of this procedure is to provide the person with the opportunity to see, on their mental screen, what their personality was like, their way of being in past incarnations, to compare it with how they are today, and then to know their inferiorities, their imperfections, which they have maintained all this time, to understand why they have been reincarnating in these last centuries and why they reincarnated this time, that is, what their proposal for Inner Reform is. And, more deeply, how to gradually free themselves from the ego's command over themselves, progressively transferring this command to their Higher Self.

What differentiates Reincarnationist Psychotherapy from Past Life Therapy is that for the latter, the classical purpose is the cure of focal symptoms, through the emptying of emotions and feelings from the past, through the repetition of the traumatic event, catharsis, reprogramming, etc., while we want to go further: for people to find their Congenital Personality and the understanding of their proposal for Inner Reform. Past Life Therapy treats the focal disorders that afflict millions of people in the world, and it is excellent in this aspect, but it is not a psychotherapy. Reincarnationist Psychotherapy provides these same benefits but transforms this Inquiry into the Unconscious into a Therapy. Past Life Therapy is a short and defined duration therapy; Reincarnationist Psychotherapy needs to be of medium or long duration if the person wants, beyond focal cures, to take much more advantage of this Inquiry.

Reincarnationist Psychotherapy is a new Psychology, based on Reincarnation, which aims to collaborate in accelerating humanity's conscious evolution. During the Inter-life Period, we remember why we had reincarnated in the last descent to Earth, and the most heard phrases there are: “Ah, if only I remembered…” and “Ah, if only I knew…” Well, the time has come for us to remember here, to know here, during incarnated life, why we reincarnated, what our proposal for Inner Reform is, in order to truly take advantage of this passage, in the sense of spiritual evolution.

It is important to emphasize that karmic interpersonal situations, what happened between parents and children, between siblings, etc., in other lives, are not shown by the Mentors; that is, people's curiosities to know what they were, who they and their father, mother, boyfriend, girlfriend, husband, wife or any child were in past lives, are not met by their Mentors, who basically focus on their conscious evolution.
mensagem-aos-psicologos-e-psiquiatras: When we advocate for the use of Regression Therapy in cases of Phobias, Panic, or Depression, and state that the cause, the origin of the symptoms, is generally in past lives, aggravated by current situations, we are not opposing psychiatrists, or psychologists; we are merely taking a stance on a subject with which we have worked for almost 20 years, in more than 10,000 regression sessions, and for which we conduct Training Courses in several states of Brazil.

We are defending an idea, a conception, a Therapy studied and performed in various countries around the world by doctors, psychologists, therapists of the most varied approaches, being studied in Universities, in Institutes, by researchers, scientists; in short, it is not a fad, something new that emerged and should soon disappear. Regression Therapy already occupies a wide space in bookstores, on the Internet, in clinics, and here in Brazil and in several countries, its results are increasingly evident and encouraging, but Allopathic Medicine and Psychology and their respective Councils continue to deny, refuse, ridicule, and claim that it is nonsense, a passing thing, that it is not “scientific.”

I am available to demonstrate my work, conduct lectures in academic settings, organize Study Groups, perform scientific work, and even teach Training Courses exclusively for psychiatrists and psychologists. We are, in fact, opening the doors and windows for Psychiatry and Psychology to free themselves from a non-reincarnationist religious conception, for them to begin to consider the possibility of other lives for their patients, for them to reclaim Dr. Freud's desire to open people’s Unconscious with these disorders, to let what is bothering them emerge from within, and if these are recollections of other lives, not to understand this as a religious matter, but as a scientific one, subject to observation and methodology. A large part of psychiatrists and psychologists believe in Reincarnation or, at least, do not dismiss this possibility, so why do they not open themselves to the study and use of Regression Therapy?

The new is here, and in fact, it is ancient. In the History of Psychiatry, in the beginning, everything was spiritual; then everything became scientific; now it is simply the time for the union of the Spiritual with Science, giving rise to the Psychiatry of the future that will deal scientifically with Reincarnation. And Psychology, when will it free itself from this conception of a beginning in childhood, which is not a beginning, but a continuation? When will it ask why each child is different from the other, with the same father, the same mother, the same conditions? When will it understand that we do not form our personality in childhood, we merely reveal it there, because our personality is congenital, we are born with it; it is the continuation of our personality from the previous life, and the one before that, and the one before that...? When will Science understand that we do not have several lives, we have only one, and that saying the origin of a phobia, of panic, of a resistant depression, is in past lives isn't literally true, it's just a way of speaking? The origin is in people's lives in other centuries.

In truth, Psychology and Psychiatry follow a religious conception, originating in the Second Council of Constantinople, in 553 AD, when the Catholic Church decided that Reincarnation does not exist. This represented one of the greatest delays in the history of humanity, which still reflects today, as we have a Psychology and a Psychiatry that limit themselves only to the present life, ignoring an entire body of study and analysis, of our past, hidden in our Unconscious. And that is where we are going, following Dr. Freud's guidance, entering people's Unconscious, where Reincarnation is found. We are followers of the Viennese master. Is this religion? No, this is scientific research, this is the emergence of a new Psychology and a new Psychiatry, when these Institutions free themselves from the Catholic conception that Reincarnation does not exist.
Many psychologists and psychiatrists believe in Reincarnation, so why do they not deal with it in their practice?
o-tratamento: Treatment with Reincarnationist Psychotherapy and Inquiry into the Unconscious

The treatment lasts for a few months or years and consists of weekly, every 10 days, or bi-weekly consultations and 4 or 5 Sessions of Inquiry into the Unconscious. Through Reincarnationist Psychotherapy (the Inner Reform Therapy) and Inquiry into the Unconscious (Ethical, under the command of the Spiritual World, allowing this procedure to be reconciled with the Law of Forgetfulness, as stated in question 399 of “The Spirits' Book”), it is possible, under the command of superior Spiritual Beings, to understand our pre-reincarnation proposals, remember how we have been utilizing our incarnations over the centuries, why we reincarnated, what the purpose and our programming for this current incarnation are, promote a re-reading of our childhood and life events from a reincarnationist perspective, redeem ourselves with conflicting Spirits, change the “persona-version” to the “Spirit-Version” regarding our life and truly make the most of this incarnation for spiritual evolution, in addition to being able to greatly improve or cure Phobias, Panic Disorder, severe Depressions, difficult-to-treat Physical Pains, such as Fibromyalgia, for example, eliminate deep feelings of loneliness, abandonment, sadness without apparent cause, fears, insecurity, infertility, etc.

Treatment with Reincarnationist Psychotherapy and Inquiry into the Unconscious can be carried out through Therapy for adults, Therapy for adolescents, Therapy for children (with Inquiries into the Unconscious in the child or in one of the parents or another relative – remotely), Couple therapy, Therapy for parents, Therapy for the elderly, and Family therapy.
What is the aim of the Treatment?

Reincarnationist Psychotherapy is a modern psychological School that incorporates Reincarnation and aims to help all of us change the view we have of our childhood and of the facts/people/situations in our lives to the view that our Spirit and our Spiritual Mentors have about them. This is what we call “persona-version” X “Spirit-Version”. This is the modus operandi of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy and, therefore, it requires a treatment of several months or years and not just "Regression" sessions, but rather conversations about it.

Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, based on Reincarnation, is a new School of Psychotherapy and the fundamental difference between it and the others is that Reincarnation is its basic element and from there the treatment is structured. It started in 1996, in Porto Alegre, and currently has a Training Course in 18 states of Brazil and hundreds of reincarnationist psychotherapists graduated from our Training Courses, in more than 100 cities in Brazil.

This new Psychotherapy was born with the purpose of bringing to Psychology and Psychiatry a possibility of expansion never before imagined. Reincarnation is added to psychological and psychiatric concepts, creating a new way to face our conflicts. Childhood is no longer considered the beginning of life and is now seen as the continuation of our eternal life; our family is no longer a group of people who united by chance through emotional ties but rather a grouping of Spirits united by karmic ties; the situations we encounter throughout life are not random but rather reflections, consequences, outcomes of our past actions, necessities for our spiritual evolutionary project.

Current Psychology, heir to a non-reincarnationist religious conception, sees our life only from childhood and, therefore, limits its field of action to a minimal fraction of our existence. It works with a mistaken concept, which is the Formation of Personality, as it states that we did not exist before. It then considers that our personality characteristics originate at the "beginning of life", as well as our negative feelings, from the conjunction of genetic, hereditary and environmental factors. Everything originated there, obligatorily, because there was nothing before. But what about our past incarnations? In our previous incarnated life, did we not have a personality? Evidently yes, so is it not reasonable and sensible to think that we are the continuation of who we were in that life prior to the current one? This overturns the concept of Personality Formation and creates another concept, revolutionary, evolutionary, clarifying, that of Congenital Personality, one of the basic pillars of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy. And our family members, our father, our mother, our siblings and other relatives? Within reincarnationist principles, we know that we are Spirits connected by energetic cords of affinity and divergence. These cords are what govern our approximation and this explains the sympathies and antipathies between family members, even hatreds and aversions. And why do we approach each other again? In the case of affinity, to continue together in a project of friendship, of joint work; in the case of divergence, to make peace, to harmonize, to love each other. And this last question is one of the main topics in Reincarnationist Psychotherapy consultations, when we deal with conflicts between parents and children and between siblings. By adding Reincarnation to Psychology, a new Psychology is created, based on our eternal life, on our pursuit of spiritual evolution, of purification.

It is a procedure of recalling and detaching from past incarnations carried out by the reincarnationist psychotherapist but commanded, directed, by the Spiritual Mentors of the individuals, respecting the Law of Forgetfulness. The Ethics in our Inquiry into the Unconscious are rigid and follow Kardec's guidance in “The Spirits' Book”, question 399, when the Master says that the Spirit reincarnates forgetting and should not remember its past, unless there is a necessity for it, not out of curiosity, and that the command of such a sensitive process is in the hands of the Spiritual Beings. And this is our stance.
Inquiry into the Unconscious is used for two purposes:

1. Therapeutic: To disconnect individuals from traumatic situations from their past, generally from past lives, that are still active in their Unconscious, giving rise to symptoms of Phobias, Panic Disorder, severe Depressions, chronic Physical Pains, feelings of loneliness, longing, abandonment, sadness without apparent reason, fears, insecurities, etc., which can greatly improve or even be quickly cured. Inquiry into the Unconscious by the ABPR (Brazilian Association of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy) Method allows reconciling Inquiry into the Unconscious with the Law of Forgetfulness by being directed by the Spiritual World and never encouraging the recognition of people.

2. Consciousness-raising: To help people remember what they were like in their past lives (secular or millennial behavioral pattern) to compare themselves to what they are today and then realize what they need to improve, transform, reform. This is the understanding of our Congenital Personality and where we find the key to achieving Inner Reform.

In Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, it is not us who command the Inquiry into the Unconscious but rather the Spiritual Mentors of each person; we merely assist the process, collaborate in this action, by promoting relaxation of their physical body and an elevation of their frequency, but we do not direct, we do not lead, we do not guide the Inquiry into the Unconscious towards the reason for the consultation, towards their main complaint, towards what the person wants to know. After a brief time, the person accesses a past event to which they are still attuned, and from there they begin to recall and tell us until the end of that event, until the end of that life, their disincarnation, until they recall their ascent to the Astral Plane (Inter-life Period), until they report feeling very well (Optimal Point). Inquiry into the Unconscious thus promotes a complete detachment from the accessed lives, one by one, and can provide a great improvement or the cure of serious chronic symptoms, in addition to the understanding of our Congenital Personality, which brings understanding of our Inner Reform proposal.
por-que-a-psicologia-e-a-psiquiatria-nao: For a long time, psychotherapists and people who believe in Reincarnation have been questioning the traditional approach of conventional Psychology, its limitation to only this life, its view of a "beginning" and an "end," as if we didn't exist before, and yearn for a new way of seeing and treating our emotional and mental problems and conflicts, based on reincarnation principles. Now, this new psychotherapeutic vision exists; it is not a new branch of Psychology, but a new School of Psychology.

This new Psychology, which we are developing, and which deals with Reincarnation, is aligned with reincarnationist conceptions and is called Reincarnationist Psychotherapy. It does not come to combat traditional Psychology or to destroy it, but to open its frontiers, from birth backward, towards our transpersonal past, and from disembodiment forward, towards our future incarnations. It is the expansion of traditional Psychology, limited to this life only, heir to the non-reincarnationist Collective Conscious, originated in the dominant religious conceptions in the West.

The reason why official Psychology does not deal with Reincarnation is due to the action of Emperor Justinian in 553 AD, who convened the Council of Constantinople, inviting only non-reincarnationist bishops, and decreeing that Reincarnation does not exist, influenced by his wife Theodora, a former courtesan, daughter of a bear keeper from the amphitheater of Byzantium. To free herself from her past, she ordered the murder of former colleagues and, so as not to suffer the consequences of this cruel order in another life as the law of Karma preconizes, she endeavored to suppress the magnificent Doctrine of Reincarnation. This Council was nothing more than a meeting that excommunicated and cursed the doctrine of the pre-existence of the soul, with protests from Pope Vigilius, kidnapped and held prisoner by Justinian for 8 years for refusing to participate in this Council! Of the 165 bishops present, 159 were non-reincarnationists, and this fact guaranteed Justinian the votes he needed to decree that Reincarnation does not exist. And so the Catholic Church became a non-reincarnationist church and, later, its dissidences carried this established dogma with them. With the predominance, in the West, of these non-reincarnationist churches, the idea that Reincarnation does not exist was created in the Western Collective Conscious, within which Psychology and Psychiatry were formed, which also do not deal with Reincarnation.

This represented one of the greatest setbacks in human history, which still reflects today, as we have a Psychology and Psychiatry that limit themselves only to the current life, ignoring a whole body of study and analysis from our past, hidden in our Unconscious. And that's where we're going, following Dr. Freud's guidance. Entering people's Unconscious, Reincarnation is found. Is that religion? No, that's scientific research, that's the emergence of a new Psychology and a new Psychiatry.

Reincarnationist Psychotherapy should not be confused with Therapeutic Regression, which is a technique used to disconnect people from traumatic situations in their past that are still happening in their Unconscious, causing symptoms, especially cases of phobias, panic disorder, and severe depressions, which can, in this way, be much improved or even quickly cured. We must not confuse Reincarnationist Psychotherapy with Therapeutic Regression: the former is a School of Psychology, the latter is a technique. Regression for Reincarnationist Psychotherapy also aims to help people realize whether or not they have been taking advantage of their incarnations in recent centuries and to understand why they are reincarnating and why they reincarnated this time.

Very few people have a clear, or more or less clear, idea about the purpose of life, and extremely few have a notion of what they are doing here. Most live as if they were in a labyrinth, lost in a dark fog, wandering around all the time, not knowing whether to go this way or that way, simply because they don't know who they really are, what they are doing here, and where they should go. Living that way is like going to a supermarket without knowing what you want to buy and then, after some time wandering the aisles, you would buy anything and leave. Living without knowing who you are and what this thing called 'life' is, is the same: you wander through the aisles, without buying anything you really need, and in the end, you leave. Or you buy things you don't need.

Nowadays, we have a Medicine that cannot truly cure, only palliate, because it believes that diseases begin in our physical body and must be cured there, when in reality they begin in our thoughts and feelings, and these are what should be treated and cured. We have a Psychology that deals with a 'beginning' in childhood and a misconception which is the formation of personality, when in fact we are a Being (Spirit) returning to Earth, bringing our personality from past incarnations (Congenital Personality). We have a Psychiatry that believes that illness is in the brain and must be treated with chemical medications, when mental illness is immaterial and caused or strongly influenced by resonances from our past incarnations and by negative influences from disembodied beings (obsessors).

One of the findings in Regression sessions is that, regardless of these factors related to their "shell," regressed individuals reported a way of being, thinking, and feeling very similar incarnation after incarnation, and still today! That is, an authoritarian, aggressive person was like that in their past incarnations; someone timid, fearful, sees themselves that way in the past; a hurt person, with feelings of rejection and abandonment, sees themselves that way in their past incarnations; someone depressed has been depressed for centuries, and this does not appear in just one or another person, it is always demonstrated in all Regression sessions. We, reincarnationist psychotherapists, hear, during Regressions, stories of people who have been reincarnating for hundreds of years to improve these negative characteristics, with very little result, always repeating the same pattern, and who, even today, are still extremely similar to what they were! We reincarnate to improve our inferior tendencies, but if we evaluate how much we have managed to improve this in ourselves in this current incarnation, we can make a similar projection for our last incarnations.

But this is not surprising, because if we are immortal Beings who merely change "shells" from one incarnation to another, isn't it obvious that our personality traits would endure from one earthly life to the next? This personality, which is ours, accompanying us incarnation after incarnation, we call Congenital Personality, and this is where the School of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy begins to structure itself. This term is found in "Obreiros da Vida Eterna" (Workers of Eternal Life), by André Luiz, psychographed by Chico Xavier, in a lecture by Dr. Barcelos, a disembodied psychiatrist, in Nosso Lar, pages 32-34, when he says:

__QUOTE__We need to disseminate in the world the moralizing concept of Congenital Personality, in a process of gradual improvement, spreading new statements that transcend the zone of fallible human reasoning and penetrate the heart, restoring hope in the eternal future and invigorating the being in its essential foundations. Reincarnationist notions will renew the landscape of life on the crust of the Earth, providing the creature not only the weapons with which it must fight its own lower states but also supplying the efficient and salutary remedy... Our companions in Humanity lack the knowledge of the transience of the physical body and the eternity of life, of the debt incurred and the necessary redemption, in various experiences and recapitulations... Sigmund Freud's theories and his followers lack the notion of reincarnationist principles and the knowledge of the true location of nervous disorders, whose onset very rarely occurs in the ordinary biological field, but almost invariably in the pre-existing perispiritual body, bearer of serious congenital disturbances, due to moral deficiencies, cultivated with insane attachment, by the reincarnating spirit, in past existences.
This initial phrase – "We need to disseminate in the moralizing concept of Congenital Personality." – is the purpose of the existence of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, its goal and objective.

The spiritual evolution of the human being is slow because, in each incarnation, we have the illusory sensation that we are living a "life" and that everything inferior in our personality and feelings was created in childhood by the "villains." Incidentally, we should change the term life to passage, birth to arrival, and death to ascent, which are more real. And, then, one of the purposes of the School of Reincarnationist Psychotherapy is to help people remember that we are eternal Spirits, going through here once again, that this life is just another passage, that we descended from the Astral Plane and, one day, we will go up there again. And then we will continue to descend and ascend, descend and ascend, descend and ascend, until we become pure, by earthly standards. And then we will continue our journey on the Astral Plane, then on the Mental Plane, and so gradually, until, one day, we return to the Whole.

The main work of the reincarnationist psychotherapist is to help the person in treatment to remember the search for spiritual evolution, purification. They must help them to make the most of this current passage, to re-read their childhood from the perspective of reincarnationist principles, to understand why we re-encounter beings with whom we carry conflicts from past incarnations, why we need to go through apparently negative, unpleasant situations, the Law of Return, etc. These discoveries and findings are what we intend to transmit, and we hope that our reflections on the conflict between our Real Self (the Essence) and the illusions of our temporary self (the current persona) will help people find themselves and embrace with more confidence and determination the ultimate goal for all of us: spiritual evolution. None of this is new to spiritists and to all who believe in Reincarnation, but now these issues are being framed as a psychotherapy.

Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, a psychology based on Reincarnation, came to help us free ourselves from earthly illusions and fantasies and to firmly attach ourselves to the truly absolute and eternal aspects of our Path. In due course, this reincarnationist vision will help official Psychology free itself from its constraints, and psychologists and psychiatrists who believe in Reincarnation no longer need to adhere to a view that analyzes their patients' lives only from childhood, because this new School is here, accessible to anyone interested; courses are open, books already exist, now it's a matter of time. Soon there will be two Psychologies: one that deals with this life only, for professionals who do not believe in Reincarnation, to be used with people who also do not deal with it, and one that deals with eternal life, which is Reincarnationist Psychotherapy, based on Reincarnation, for those who believe in it. It's a matter of coherence.
psicoterapia-para-quem-ouve-vozes: People who hear voices, in the vast majority of cases, are indeed hearing them; they are voices of Spirits*, whose presence can occur due to some kind of affinity (a deceased relative or friend, a drug, drink, or cigarette companion, an enemy from past lives, etc.),

sometimes simply to be near, but more generally with the purpose of disturbing or harming them, motivated by situations from other incarnations, in which they were their victims or companions. In this case, upon encountering the tormentor or an old companion from the past, from an adventure or some other action or activity, they do not see this person as they are today, but rather as they were then, and, from then on, remain attuned to them. The only power they have is to enter their thoughts and start speaking within, generally demanding things from the past, threatening, giving bad advice, encouraging them to perform totally inexplicable procedures for the person themselves and for those living with them (what is called OCD), having fits of rage, breaking things, killing someone or themselves, taking off clothes, laughing uncontrollably, etc.

These cases are usually referred for psychological or psychiatric treatment, but most psychologists and psychiatrists do not deal with this hypothesis (spiritual obsession), and the diagnosis, invariably, is Schizophrenia, and what is called Treatment is initiated, but it is not a treatment that will promote a cure, primarily because this is not a disease, and also because it does not address the focus of the problem (the presence of one or more Spirits), but only lowers dopamine and adrenaline and increases serotonin, which gives a certain sense of improvement but never brings the solution, which can only be achieved by going to these Spirit(s), in an awareness and/or direct or distant de-obsession work, in an appropriate place for this, free of charge.

Drug treatment can be used for a time, for the person to feel a little better, while this procedure is carried out, directly at the origin of the voice(s) the person hears, but it can never be "The Treatment" as it is palliative and superficial and tends to chronicize the condition, as routinely observed in psychiatric practice in clinics and hospitals.

But besides the mere palliative effect of "antipsychotic" medications and their hundreds of side effects (those complicated names in the package inserts), what is even worse is the diagnosis that the medium receives, because Schizophrenia is an elegant way of calling them crazy, but, despite the elegance of the term, that is how they begin to consider themselves and be considered by their family and circle of friends. And the "crazy" person, besides hearing voices that only they hear, that they cannot get out of their head, that generally torment them day and night, that control their thoughts, do not let them reason, study, work, lead a normal life, has to live with the side effects of these chemicals (often worse than the original symptoms), lives a routine of home-clinic-hospitalization where everyone's gaze is one of pity, of compassion, for their "madness," because no one believes them, the doctor doesn't believe them, their family members don't believe them, their friends don't believe them, they are crazy, they say they hear voices!, poor them, life is over for them, they will have to take medicine all their life, they will be hospitalized from time to time, the consultations will become less frequent and shorter, to ask how they are, still hearing voices?, increase the dose, replace with a more modern "antipsychotic," a hypnotic to sleep, an antidepressant so they don't feel so bad, maybe another tranquilizer so they don't get so agitated?, and so will be the life of our "crazy" person, theirs and their deceased companion(s).

One day, a true Treatment, in a Spiritist or Spiritualist Center or a Temple or Church, may yield results with the referral of their companion(s) to the Spiritual World, and the medications may begin to be withdrawn, perhaps eliminated, and our "crazy" person may, at last, begin to lead a more or less normal life, but many years have already passed, they are behind in relation to the natural evolution of life, they have gained the reputation of being "crazy," they cannot laugh too loudly, or have a fit of rage, they cannot stay in their room for too long, they cannot wear an unconventional haircut, or a somewhat strange tattoo, they are "crazy" – remember they heard voices? – they took medicine for a long time, they were hospitalized, they underwent spiritual Treatment, poor thing.

The “disease” is over, but the sequelae of lost time remain, the reputation with their family and circle of friends (if any friends are left…), the family’s insecurity that the “madness” might return, their own insecurity about it. And then I ask: Why all this? Why don’t people directly seek a Treatment that can yield results, that goes straight to the issue, to the disincarnate Spirit(s) by their side? Why years and years of using chemical, palliative medications, which everyone knows don’t solve anything, but only deactivate the brain, decrease brain activity, aiming to make the person more “calm,” more “tranquil,” although this “calm and tranquility” is never reported by the people, who continue with the Spirit(s) by their side, and now, with the medication “treatment,” they become even more unable to think, reason, study, work, dedicating themselves to staying at home, vegetating, sleeping, watching television, on the computer, going to the bakery for bread, things like that. The Spirits initiate the process of hindering them, blocking them, the chemical medications complete the service. Formerly, surgical lobotomy was used, today it is chemical.

Obviously, if the person hearing voices is threatening to kill themselves or someone else, is demonstrating risky attitudes for themselves or others, they should be medicated and even hospitalized, but, concomitantly, a Treatment should be initiated directly with the Spirit(s) influencing them, by attending a spiritual place that deals with this, free of charge or for a minimal fee to cover the place's expenses, nothing about paying thousands of reais, because that already shows that the purpose of the place is to enrich its leaders.

Spiritual Treatment can be performed even if they are taking medication; this does not interfere with the Treatment. However, if they do not leave home, refuse to go, or are hospitalized, another person can go for them, serving as an intermediary (“bridge”), performing remote de-obsession, which can yield the same positive result or, at least, make them improve enough to start going to the place for de-obsessive Treatment.

But, while the medium without control over their mediumship remains obsessed, hearing voices, shrinking back in fear, not knowing what to do, feeling dominated by the voices, believing they are crazy, an appropriate psychotherapeutic Treatment for this type of situation should be carried out concomitantly, a Treatment aimed at:

__LIST__Helping them free themselves from the diagnosis of Schizophrenia and embrace that of a medium without control over their mediumship||Changing their attitude and understanding that they are not weak and defenceless and can converse with the Spirit(s) who are influencing them||Convincing them to go to a specialized spiritual de-obsession treatment center||Stimulating them to study, develop, and discipline their mediumship||Agreeing to take or maintain psychiatric medications if necessary, for the necessary time, or even be hospitalized, if there is a risk to themselves or others.
Let's see how the Treatment is, step by step:

Diagnosis of Schizophrenia – this is the main point. The person arrives at the office with a diagnosis of Schizophrenia, and the main point of our Treatment is to change this label (“crazy”) to “medium without control over their mediumship” and to understand that they are going through a moment in life where their mediumship is out of control and needs to learn to control it and use it to their advantage and not as a loophole for Spirits to penetrate their thoughts. Their family members, who, while we usually meet 1x/week, are with them daily, 24h/day, also need to understand this and transmit this “diagnosis” to other family members, friends, and acquaintances who are aware of what is happening. If this is not done, we cannot move on to the next step. Primitive Psychiatry believed that everything was the work of Spirits; scientific Psychiatry decreed that everything is an imbalance of neurotransmitters; the Psychiatry of the future will synthesize both, but in the case of people who hear voices, primitive Psychiatry will again predominate because, in this aspect, it is the most correct.

From the change in diagnosis, with the person and their family and friends understanding what is really happening, that this person who hears voices is not schizophrenic but rather a medium without control over their mediumship, the next step is to make them completely change their attitude, leave the passive situation of being subjugated by the Spirit(s), whether or not there is ill intent towards them, to a posture of controlling the situation, of mental dialogue with these disincarnate being(s), of dominion over the circumstance and no longer of submission, as if they were a poor, defenceless creature, to emerge from this passive acceptance of what is happening, as if they were impotent, as if they had no Spiritual Mentors, Guides, so many superior Spiritual Beings who can resolve the situation if called, if contacted. We must awaken the inner Warrior of this person so that they emerge from this passivity, this fear, this shrinking, transferring the solution to this situation to the psychiatrist, to medications, to their therapist, to the Spiritist or Spiritualist Center, when they themselves, with the strength of their thought, with the help of the superior Spiritual Beings who accompany them, could resolve this issue. But, due to the diagnosis of “madness” (Schizophrenia), with them, their family members and acquaintances believing that the voices are not real, are imaginary voices, that this is a disease, the person feels ill, feels weak, does not believe they have the strength to reverse this, everyone believes that there is no solution, that they will have to spend the rest of their life treating this “disease,” taking “antipsychotics,” being hospitalized from time to time, and then our poor medium is left without a way out and, probably, their life will be like this until the end or until they go to a Spiritist or Spiritualist Center to seek a solution or someone goes for them or their Mentors decide to take on the case and refer the Spirit(s) accompanying them to the Spiritual World, ending the situation.

The solution for those who hear voices lies, then, in a Center or Church or Temple, but, generally, it is very difficult for the person to go to one of these places, because the Spirit(s) who accompany them do not allow it, as they do not want the situation to be resolved, and, as they are dominating their thoughts, they interfere with their will to go, convincing them not to go, causing an increase in their discomfort, a strong headache, a sudden increase in depression, anguish, discouragement, or a sudden idea that it will be useless, that it is nonsense, not worth going, better to stay at home, and the same, often, happens with family members who would accompany them. It is important that the psychotherapist emphasizes this influence against going to a spiritual treatment place so that, when this occurs on the day of treatment or at the time of going, the person and their family members decide to go anyway, even if feeling ill, even with pain, even thinking that it will not help. Another tactic used by the influencing Spirits is the opposite: they distance themselves a little, free up the person's thoughts, make them feel better, give the impression of a great and sudden improvement, causing the person or their family members to believe that they no longer need to go for treatment, but, by not going, everything soon returns to what it was before.

Since someone who hears voices is a medium and not a sick person, it is mandatory that they regularly attend the spiritual place of their preference, because although Divine Energy and the presence of superior Spiritual Beings are everywhere, they are more concentrated in these places, and regularly attending a Center, a Church, a Temple, participating in sessions, attending lectures, receiving blessings, passes, fluidic transmissions, listening to good words, good advice, good guidance, brings a good or excellent result not only for the person but also for their invisible companion(s).

Although chemical medications are not able to make a person stop hearing voices, as they do not come from their brain but from external sources, sometimes they are recommended to reduce anguish, depression, emotional instability, and insomnia. Hospitalization is only recommended if there is a risk of death for the person (suicide) or for other people (homicide); otherwise, it worsens the condition because it reinforces the diagnosis of "illness," of being sick, which is totally contrary to the Treatment we are suggesting here.

So, in summary, the Treatment for those who hear voices from Spirits is to make them move from a passive condition of being sick, crazy, a victim, incapable, to a positive, active condition, to embrace their mediumship, talk to the Spirit(s) accompanying them, find out what they want, if it's something from the past, ask for forgiveness, offer to help this disincarnate brother(s), not follow their advice to drink, smoke, use drugs, break things, attempt against their life or others' lives, straighten up, raise their head and spine, unleash their inner Warrior, develop their self-esteem, attend spiritualized places, undertake a Treatment with the aim of resolving this issue, including benefiting the being(s) accompanying them, then study, discipline, and develop their mediumship, serve in a spiritualist place to help brothers and sisters who are going through what they went through. Lighter psychiatric medications such as a tranquilizer or a sleeping pill can be used, but the so-called "antipsychotics," which are actually powerful tranquilizers that only serve to slow down the brain, are contraindicated, except in extreme cases, for the necessary time, while the Treatment suggested here is carried out concomitantly.

* Spirit is a religious denomination for our energetic Self, what moves us, moves our brain, heart, our entire organism, all our vital functions, makes us have thoughts, feelings, movements; in short, we can compare this energetic Self to the driver of a car and our physical body to the car. Because it is called “Spirit,” it has created an almost insurmountable prejudice within the official scientific community, which labels this as “a religious matter,” when, in fact, it is the harbinger of the Science of the future, in which Physics will supersede Chemistry.
__SUB__Spiritual obsession as a disease of the soul is already recognized by Medicine. (Dr. Sérgio Felipe de Oliveira)

Since 1998, the World Health Organization (WHO) has included spiritual well-being as one of the definitions of health, alongside the physical, mental, and social aspects. Previously, WHO defined health as the state of complete biological, psychological, and social well-being of the individual and disregarded spiritual well-being, that is, the suffering of the soul; it therefore had a reductionist, organicist view of human nature, not seeing it in its totality: mind, body, and spirit.
But, after the date mentioned above, it began to define health as the state of complete well-being of the integral human being: biological, psychological, and spiritual.

Thus, spiritual obsession officially became known in Medicine as possession and trance state, which is an item of the ICD – International Classification of Diseases – which allows the diagnosis of obsessive spiritual interference.

ICD 10, item F.44.3 defines trance and possession state as the transient loss of identity with maintenance of environmental awareness, distinguishing between normal cases, i.e., those that occur through incorporation or action of spirits, from pathological ones, caused by disease.
Cases, for example, where a person enters a trance during religious services and mediumistic sessions are not considered a disease.

In this aspect, hallucination is a symptom that can arise both in psychiatric mental disorders – in this case, it would be a disease, a psychotic dissociative disorder or what is popularly known as madness – as well as in the interference of a disincarnate being, Spiritual Obsession.
Therefore, Psychiatry already distinguishes between the normal trance state and that of psychotics, which would be abnormal or unhealthy.

The Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders of the American Psychiatric Association – DSM IV – warns that physicians should be careful not to mistakenly diagnose as hallucination or psychosis cases of people from certain religious communities who say they see or hear spirits of dead people, because this may not mean a hallucination or madness.
